title.description: I create web projects and experiments.

hero.subtitle: On this site, you'll find my works - from aesthetic interfaces to small, inventive mini-projects. Click a card to see details.

cards.title: Flight scope
cards.description: Watch live flights, fly alongside a 3D aircraft model, and explore details of each flight. The project uses ADS-B data from OpenSky Network and is still under development.

cards.title: Spotify music recommender
cards.description: A music recommendation system based on Spotify data. Unfortunately, the Spotify API audio-features endpoint has been discontinued, so the project is only available as a demo.

cards.title: 👷 Section under construction 🚧🚧
cards.description: The projects section is currently under construction. Check back soon!

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Do you have a question or an idea for collaboration? Send a message - I'll be happy to respond.

cv.heading: My resume
cv.subtitle: You can find both resume language versions here. Open or download each file.
